## Description

Briefly describe what this PR does.

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation
- [ ] `refactor` — refactoring without behavior change
- [ ] `test` — tests
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Examples updated (if public API changed)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy fastvk/` passes
- [ ] No breaking changes (or breaking change is intentional and documented)

Fixes #
